name: xchtip.app
tagline: Embeddable Chia tip buttons — XCH or any CAT, wallet to wallet.
description:
xchtip.app builds a **tip button you can embed on any website** with one line of HTML. Pick a recipient, an asset (XCH or any CAT — including **$DIG**), and a color scheme; copy the snippet; done. Visitors connect a Chia wallet over WalletConnect and tip on-chain, wallet to wallet — non-custodial, no account, no middleman.

## What you get

- **The builder** — a live workbench: configure the button on the left, watch it come to life on the stage, copy one line of HTML.
- **A tip page** — no website needed: every recipient gets a shareable landing page at `xchtip.app/jar/<address>` with a working tip button. Deterministic and backend-free — the whole page lives in the URL.
- **The embed** — a self-contained widget script. On click it opens its own WalletConnect session, the visitor picks an amount, and the widget builds, signs, and broadcasts the payment (XCH plain spend, or a CAT ring spend for any asset id).
- **A machine API** — every snippet is also available as plain text (`/embed.txt?…`) and every builder state is a shareable query-param URL, so tools and agents can generate embeds without the UI.

Schemes: green (XCH), purple ($DIG), orange (HOA), or any custom hex accent. Custom logos supported for any brand or CAT.
